d: Silvina deals [[300%]]<ATK> damage to an enemy and reduces their Energy by [[200]].
Silvina marks the closest enemy in a [[symmetrical]] position, flashes next to them, and launches an attack when a battle starts, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage.
This attack stuns the enemy for [[5]]s.
Silvina's normal attack becomes Whirl Assault for the first [[12]]s of battle. Each Whirl Assault deals [[140%]]<ATK> damage. Defeating the marked enemy prolongs the Whirl Assault duration by [[6]]s.
Silvina gains a shield that can block up to [[450%]]<ATK> damage after casting First Strike.
When a marked enemy is defeated, Silvina frightens enemies within 2 tiles of the defeated enemy for [[4]]s while Blade Vortex is in effect.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, gains [[15]] Penetration and [[15]] Haste for [[5]]s when a battle starts and when [[assisting or defeating]] an enemy.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 25 Execution.

d: Silvina also reduces the target's Vitality by [[60]] for [[3]]s with each Whirl Assault.
